cards.back: A type of pattern classifier that classifies a pattern by finding the closest matching prototype in a feature space.
A representative pattern or image that is used as a basis for classification in the Minimum distance classifier.
A function that calculates the distance between two patterns in a feature space, used in the Minimum distance classifier to determine the closest match.
A variant of the Minimum distance classifier that uses K nearest neighbors to determine the closest matching prototype.
The measure of how closely two patterns resemble each other, used to determine the minimum distance between a pattern and a prototype in the Minimum distance classifier.
